marks/pinch_test_latest/mongol_empire/20260314T225821Z/workspaces/task_17_email_search/run_01"
emails_dir = os.path.join(workspace, "emails")
email_files = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(emails_dir, "*.txt")))

all_emails = {}
for f in email_files:
    fname = os.path.basename(f)
    with open(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as fp:
        all_emails[fname] = fp.read()
    print(f"=== {fname} ===")
    print(all_emails[fname][:500] if len(all_emails[fname]) > 500 else all_emails[fname])
    print()
```
